overview.description: Healthcare in Vietnam is undergoing rapid modernization with 1,400+ public hospitals and a growing private sector. AI applications include medical imaging analysis, clinical document processing, patient flow optimization, and drug interaction prediction.
overview.marketSizeVietnam: ~$20B healthcare spending; government targets 10% of GDP by 2030
overview.marketSizeSEA: ~$430B regional healthcare market with strong growth from aging population

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: Medium — fragmented across hospital systems; national EMR not yet unified
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: Low to medium — paper records still common in provincial hospitals

painPoints.problem: Radiologist shortage causes diagnostic delays; AI-assisted imaging can help
Clinical documentation is manual, time-consuming, and error-prone
Patient wait times and resource allocation in hospitals are inefficient
Drug interaction and dosage errors cause preventable adverse events

relatedNodes.description: Pharma and healthcare share clinical trial data and drug efficacy modeling.
